earth_vacation_packages.name: Human Settlement Observation Tour
earth_vacation_packages.description: Observe human behavior patterns in their natural habitat. Watch them consume excessive amounts of caffeine and argue about trivial matters.

earth_vacation_packages.name: Natural Phenomena Experience
earth_vacation_packages.description: Experience Earth's unique atmospheric and geological phenomena without human interference.

earth_vacation_packages.name: Cultural Immersion Program
earth_vacation_packages.description: Deep dive into human civilization and cultural practices. Warning: May cause confusion about human logic.

earth_vacation_packages.name: Fuel Consumption Investigation
earth_vacation_packages.description: Investigate why these nutty Earthlings want to consume all the fuel of the universe. Research purposes only.

low.description: Minimal telepathic emission to avoid human detection

unrestricted.description: Full telepathic capabilities in uninhabited areas
